scripts.test:syntax: node --check app.js && node --check i18n.mjs && node --check map-link-core.mjs && node --check map-geometry.mjs && node --check map-interactions.mjs && node --check location-core.mjs && node --check ui-core.mjs && node --check ui-shell.mjs && node --check ui-dialogs.mjs && node --check ui-components.mjs && node --check ui-swipe-dismiss.mjs && node --check data-client.mjs && node --check domain-core.mjs && node --check view-templates.mjs && node --check list-view-templates.mjs && node --check account-share-templates.mjs && node --check form-templates.mjs && node --check map-view-templates.mjs && sh scripts/python.sh -m py_compile server.py mcp_server.py oauth_service.py foodiemap_service.py scripts/migrate_sqlite_to_postgres_gcs.py
